_comment: All tunable thresholds for Command Center. Edit values here without touching code. Reload the page to apply.

owners._comment: Auto-route action ownership by portfolio name suffix. Format: '<suffix>': '<owner name>'. Portfolios not matching → blank.

portfolio_budgets._comment: Approximate monthly portfolio budgets in USD. Used for budget reallocation slack calc.

verdict_windows._comment: Days post-action to compute verdicts. Sun-Sat aligned.

confidence_thresholds._comment: Confidence flag based on after-window orders + spend.

rubrics._comment: Per-action-type success criteria. Multi-action bundles use the 'combo' rubric. All percentages are signed (positive = increase).
rubrics._combo_comment: When 2+ actions logged together, the combo rubric overrides individual ones. This protects against misreading legitimate scaling tradeoffs as failures.

combo_default._comment: Used for any multi-action bundle not explicitly defined above.

diagnostic._comment: Used by Diagnostic Engine (Batch B). Significance threshold for triggering driver decomposition.

harvest._comment: Search term harvester thresholds. Account-or-campaign level (not portfolio target).

reallocate._comment: Budget reallocation engine. Conservative defaults — max 10% portfolio shift per week.

briefing._comment: Weekly Briefing generator. SC only, Mon delivery, Sun-Sat reporting period.

calibration_actions._comment: Real Mar 5 + Mar 11 actions logged by Suryansh on Security Signs portfolio. Pre-loaded for verdict engine validation. Format: { date, owner, action_types[], campaigns[], notes }
